tags.description: Hōniana Te Puni-Kōkopu was a rangitira of Ngāti Te Whiti and Ngāti Tāwhirikura hapu of Te Āti Awa - from a sign below the street name sign
tags.name: Hōniana Te Puni Street
tags.note: WCC Koata Hātepe Committee decided on 13 Dec 2023 to change the name from Epuni St to Hōniana Te Epuni Street - unveiling on 23 May 2024 at 10h
